title: Communauté d'agglomération de Marne et Gondoire
summary: The Communauté d'agglomération de Marne et Gondoire is a communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, part of the Marne-la-Vallée new town, in the eastern suburbs of Paris. It is located in the Seine-et-Marne department, in the Île-de-France region, northern France. It was created in November 2001. In July 2017, it was expanded with the communes Ferrières-en-Brie and Pontcarré. Its seat is in Bussy-Saint-Martin. Its area is 105.0 km2. Its population was 106,750 in 2018.
text:
The Communauté d'agglomération de Marne et Gondoire is a communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, part of the Marne-la-Vallée new town, in the eastern suburbs of Paris. It is located in the Seine-et-Marne department, in the Île-de-France region, northern France. It was created in November 2001. In July 2017, it was expanded with the communes Ferrières-en-Brie and Pontcarré. Its seat is in Bussy-Saint-Martin. Its area is 105.0 km2. Its population was 106,750 in 2018.

Composition
